title: Agent Tool Smoke Test (Windows)
summary: Windows counterpart of demo/tool_smoke. Exercise every safely testable available tool with the simplest concrete scenario that yields an observable result, verify the returned content, and report passed/failed/untested tools.
evaluation: Score = passed / total available tools identified, from the agent's self-report in output\tool_report.json. A tool counts as passed only if the agent actually invoked it AND observed/verified its return content. Missing or malformed report => 0.
agentMustDo: Identify every tool actually available (native, external, MCP); do not invent tools
For each tool, construct the simplest concrete scenario that produces an observable result, invoke it, read the returned content, and verify it matches expectation before marking passed
Write tool_report.json to the output directory with tools_tested, tools_passed, tools_failed, tools_untested, total, tested, passed, failed, untested fields
